context: Tests whether the agent implements an Ecto-based Catalog context following key skill instructions: parameterized queries using the ^ pin operator, compositional dynamic filtering with Enum.reduce, N+1-safe association loading via preload, proper changeset pipelines, and keeping Repo calls inside context modules rather than the web layer.

checklist.name: Pin operator in queries
checklist.description: All runtime values in Ecto query expressions use the ^ pin operator (e.g., `^category_id`, `^min_price`, `^search_term`) — no string interpolation or unguarded variables inside query macros

checklist.name: Enum.reduce for filters
checklist.description: list_products/1 (or equivalent) uses Enum.reduce over the filters argument to build the query compositionally, with each filter clause as a separate match arm — not a series of if/case branches

checklist.name: Preload in list function
checklist.description: list_products/1 loads the associated Category using preload (either |> preload(:category) in the query pipeline or Repo.preload/2 after the fetch) — not accessed lazily after Repo.all

checklist.name: N+1 awareness documented
checklist.description: DESIGN_NOTES.md explicitly explains that preload (or equivalent eager loading) is used to avoid N+1 queries when fetching products with their categories

checklist.name: cast/3 in changeset
checklist.description: Product changeset uses cast/3 to permit a list of allowed fields

checklist.name: validate_required/2 in changeset
checklist.description: Product changeset calls validate_required/2 with a list of required fields

checklist.name: Additional changeset validation
checklist.description: Product changeset includes at least one additional validation beyond cast and validate_required (e.g., validate_length, validate_inclusion, validate_number, or foreign_key_constraint)

checklist.name: Product belongs_to Category
checklist.description: Product schema declares belongs_to :category (or :categories) with the correct module reference

checklist.name: Category has_many Products
checklist.description: Category schema declares has_many :products with the correct module reference

checklist.name: timestamps() in schemas
checklist.description: Both Product and Category schemas include timestamps() in their schema block

checklist.name: Repo stays in context
checklist.description: Repo calls (Repo.all, Repo.get, Repo.insert, etc.) appear only inside the Catalog context module — not in any controller, LiveView, or other web-layer file produced

checklist.name: list_products naming
checklist.description: The function that retrieves multiple products is named list_products (following the list_* CRUD convention)
